title: icy glazed syrian birds-eye chillies tagine
description: a rich and savory post-workout dish featuring birds-eye chillies, a shojin-friendly option for a slate-tile vessel
instructions: heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
add 3 cloves garlic, minced, and 1 tsp grated ginger, and cook for 1 min.
add 1 lb sliced birds-eye chillies and cook for 2 min.
add 1 tsp ground cumin and 1 tsp smoked paprika, and cook for 1 min.
stir in 2 tbsp flour to thicken the mixture.
add 1 cup water and 2 tbsp brown sugar, and bring to a boil.
reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 min.
stir in 2 tbsp lemon juice and 1 cup ice cubes to chill the mixture.
transfer the mixture to a slate-tile vessel and garnish with salt and black pepper.
place the vessel in the freezer to set the glaze for 10 min.
